article.title: AI vs Human Writing in 2026 - Can Google Tell the Difference
article.body_markdown:
The short answer: Google does not penalize AI content. It penalizes low-quality content.

But there is a catch: most AI content IS low-quality. Generic. Robotic. Full of fluff.

**What Makes AI Content Sound Robotic:**
- Overused phrases: "unlock your potential"
- No specific examples
- Perfect grammar with zero personality
- Every paragraph the same length

**How to Make AI Content Sound Human:**
1. Use real company names and statistics
2. Write in first person
3. Vary sentence length
4. Add an honest opinion
5. Use AI built for human-like output

In 2026, the winning formula is AI drafting + human editing. Let AI handle structure and research. Add your experience and voice.

I built [SEO Spark](https://seospark.net) to write like a human marketer - real stats, varied sentences, first-person perspective. 3 free articles.
